topic: PostgreSQL Monitoring: pg_stat_statements, pg_stat_activity và slow query detection
summary: pg_stat_statements: track query statistics (calls, total_time, mean_time, rows) — tìm slow queries không cần log. pg_stat_activity: xem queries đang chạy, locks. pg_stat_user_tables: table scan statistics.
problem: Query slow nhưng không biết query nào. Không có APM tool. Log query chứa sensitive data. Cần tìm top-N expensive queries trong production.
solution: pg_stat_statements extension: aggregate statistics per query normalized (parameters replaced với $1, $2). Không log data, chỉ statistics. Reset với pg_stat_statements_reset().
codeExample:
-- Enable (postgresql.conf)
shared_preload_libraries = 'pg_stat_statements'
pg_stat_statements.max = 10000
pg_stat_statements.track = all

-- Tạo extension
CREATE EXTENSION pg_stat_statements;

-- Top 10 slowest queries (by total time)
SELECT substring(query, 1, 100) AS query,
    calls, total_exec_time::bigint AS total_ms,
    mean_exec_time::bigint AS mean_ms,
    stddev_exec_time::bigint AS stddev_ms,
    rows
FROM pg_stat_statements
ORDER BY total_exec_time DESC LIMIT 10;

-- Top queries by mean time (không phải total — có thể ít gọi nhưng rất chậm)
SELECT substring(query, 1, 100), calls, mean_exec_time::bigint AS mean_ms
FROM pg_stat_statements
WHERE calls > 100  -- ignore one-off queries
ORDER BY mean_exec_time DESC LIMIT 10;

-- Queries đang chạy hiện tại
SELECT pid, now() - query_start AS duration, state, left(query, 100)
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE state != 'idle'
ORDER BY duration DESC;

-- Detect lock waits
SELECT wait_event_type, wait_event, left(query, 100)
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE wait_event_type = 'Lock';

-- Table statistics
SELECT relname, seq_scan, idx_scan,
    ROUND(idx_scan::float / NULLIF(seq_scan + idx_scan, 0) * 100, 2) AS idx_pct
FROM pg_stat_user_tables
WHERE seq_scan > 0
ORDER BY seq_scan DESC LIMIT 10;
tradeoffs: pg_stat_statements track normalized queries (no parameter values): khó reproduce chính xác với edge cases
stats reset khi PostgreSQL restart hoặc gọi pg_stat_statements_reset() — plan retention theo công cụ
track = all bao gồm utility statements (CREATE, VACUUM): có thể noisier — dùng track = top cho chỉ top-level
Kết hợp với Datadog/New Relic PostgreSQL integration để trend over time

selfVerification.method: Query pg_stat_statements sau load test — verify top slow queries được identify
